overview: Great Lakes Integrative Medicine treats men and women experiencing hormone imbalance through bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, peptide therapy, and other integrative medicine approaches. The practice blends conventional and holistic medicine to address health concerns and improve overall wellness.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) in multiple delivery methods (pellets, injectables, creams, oral)
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormone imbalance symptoms including menopause, andropause, thyroid disorders, and fatigue.
